zh.lifeSummary: 當Ida Longespée於1208年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury32歲，母親Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury22歲。她於1220年之前與Ralph de Somery在英國英格蘭結婚。她去世於1268年1月7日在她的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ida Longespée于1208年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury32岁，母亲Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury22岁。她于1220年之前与Ralph de Somery在英国英格兰结婚。她去世于1268年1月7日在她的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Ida
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Norman name, of Germanic origin, derived from īd ‘work’. This died out during the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, influenced by its use in Tennyson's The Princess ( 1847 ) for the central character, who devotes herself to the cause of women's rights and women's education in a thoroughly Victorian way. The name is also associated with Mount Ida in Crete, which was connected in classical times with the worship of Zeus, king of the gods, who was supposed to have been brought up in a cave on the mountainside. In the 1930s it became famous as the name of the film star Ida Lupino ( 1914–1995 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ida Longespée was born in 1208, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, was 32 and her mother, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, was 22. She married Ralph de Somery before 1220, in England, United Kingdom. She died on 7 January 1268, in her hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ida Longespée est née en 1208, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Somery avant 1220, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 7 janvier 1268, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ida Longespée 1208 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury 32 und ihre Mutter Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury 22. Sie hat vor 1220 in England, United Kingdom Ralph de Somery geheiratet. Sie starb am 7. Januar 1268 im Alter von 60 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ida Longespée è nata il nel 1208 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Somery prima del 1220, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 7 gennaio 1268, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ida Longespéeが1208年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisburyは32歳，母Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisburyは22歳であった。1220年以前にイギリスイギリスでRalph de Someryと結婚した。彼女は1268年1月7日に故郷で60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ida Longespée(이)가 1208년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1220년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Ralph de Somery(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1268년 1월 7일 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ida Longespée nasceu em 1208, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Somery antes 1220, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1268, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ida Longespée родилась в 1208 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Somery перед 1220 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 7 января 1268 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ida Longespée nació en 1208, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Ralph de Somery antes de 1220, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 7 de enero de 1268, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
